introSection: Twistosaurus is a steel kiddie spinning roller coaster located at Flamingo Land in Malton, North Yorkshire, England, UK. Built by Zamperla, it opened on May 25, 2013 and is located near Dino Roller in the "Dino-Stone Park" section of the park.

sections.title: History
sections.content: In 2017, 105-year-old Jack Reynolds became the oldest person to ride a roller coaster, as recognized by Guinness World Records. He went on to become the oldest person to ride a zip wire and the oldest to appear as a supporting artist in a television program before his death in April 2020 aged 108.

fullText:
Twistosaurus is a steel kiddie spinning roller coaster located at Flamingo Land in Malton, North Yorkshire, England, UK. Built by Zamperla, it opened on May 25, 2013 and is located near Dino Roller in the "Dino-Stone Park" section of the park.

In 2017, 105-year-old Jack Reynolds became the oldest person to ride a roller coaster, as recognized by Guinness World Records. He went on to become the oldest person to ride a zip wire and the oldest to appear as a supporting artist in a television program before his death in April 2020 aged 108.






 * Official webpage for Twistosaurus
